title: hellenocarum strictum
intro: Hellenocarum strictum, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Hellenocarum strictum include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticoagulant properties, which contribute to its traditional use in treating menstrual disorders, arthritis, and high blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include reducing menstrual cramps, promoting digestion, and improving circulation, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Hellenocarum strictum is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for convenience.
